_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: NF90-8, ST88-14 and RHT-92 all responded to IL-6 stimulation as seen by the 17–300-fold increase in Y705 phosphorylation
details: 17-300-fold increase in Y705 phosphorylation in response to IL-6 stimulation
